notableIncidents.title: Integrations API Degraded
notableIncidents.narrative: The Integrations API experienced performance degradation and remained under investigation throughout the reporting period.

notableIncidents.title: Completion API Degraded - labs-leanstral-2603 · Chat Completions API
notableIncidents.narrative: Degradation was reported specifically affecting the labs-leanstral-2603 Chat Completions endpoint.

notableIncidents.title: We’ve suspended access to Claude Mythos 5 and Claude Fable 5
notableIncidents.narrative: Access to the Claude Mythos 5 and Claude Fable 5 models was suspended and remains under monitoring.

notableIncidents.title: Voxtral Mini 3B 2507 — down
notableIncidents.narrative: The Voxtral Mini 3B 2507 model experienced a full service outage.

notableIncidents.title: Web endpoints is down — down
notableIncidents.narrative: A service outage impacted the availability of web endpoints.

notableIncidents.title: Small Number of Users Have Incorrectly Cancelled Subscription
notableIncidents.narrative: A logic error resulted in incorrect subscription cancellations for a subset of the user base.

observations: Avoid relying on Claude API or Claude Code for mission-critical workflows due to low reliability scores and high recovery times.
Implement aggressive retry logic and failover strategies when using Deepgram and Helicone to mitigate long recovery durations.
Treat Modal as a highly reliable infrastructure provider for compute workloads, despite recent endpoint instability.
Utilize Fireworks AI for latency-sensitive applications given its superior recovery speed and high reliability score.
